desc: One of my commit sha starts with "a".
I committed on the day when the crew of the USCSS Nostromo made their fateful landing and discovered the Xenomorph on LV-426!

body: Commits: - 8901f2e: chore: migrate soroban-sdk 25.1.0 -> 26.0.1, fix deprecated APIs Required for poseidon_permutation host function (CAP-0075), which is gated behind the hazmat-crypto feature and was added as a publicly callable env.crypto_hazmat() entry point starting in SDK 26.x. Also fixes deprecation warnings surfaced by the upgrade across all workspace members: - crypto::bn254::Fr -> Bn254Fr (avoids ambiguity with Bls12381Fr) - Events::publish() -> #[contractevent] macro (DepositEvent, ClaimEvent structs in growthip-pool) Whole-workspace build and test suite confirmed clean (0 warnings, 0 errors) after migration.

My favorite commit message words are:

1. add (used 192 times)
2. update (used 174 times)
3. pool (used 70 times)
4. new (used 66 times)
5. readme.md (used 63 times)
Commits: - cc37b7e: fix(analytics): 4-col summary cards, fix USDC float display, remove period filter - aadbfc5: fix(topbar): network dropdown checkmark, divider, proper icons matching prototype

Commits: - 1d93082: fix(security): on-chain root validation against forgery attack Fixes a critical vulnerability where claim() never validated the proof's root against any on-chain state. A Groth16 proof only proves knowledge of a path to root X — it does NOT prove X is a root this pool produced. An attacker could build a fake tree offline and drain the pool without depositing. Fix: deposit_internal() now recomputes the Merkle root on-chain via Soroban's native poseidon_permutation host function (Protocol 25, CAP-0075), and appends it to a bounded on-chain root history. claim() validates the proof's root against this history before any other check. Verified, not assumed: - poseidon_verify_test.rs: Soroban's Poseidon output matches circomlibjs byte-for-byte across t=2/3/4 arities, against real production ground truth (apps/web/src/lib/poseidon.ts) - merkle_verify_test.rs: on-chain rebuild_merkle_root() matches the frontend's merkle.ts root construction exactly - test_claim_to_with_v3_verifier_and_proof: deposits the actual commitment used to generate a real proof artifact, exercising the full deposit->root->claim path end to end Three pre-existing tests now fail because they relied on the absence of root validation to pass (each deposited a disconnected dummy commitment unrelated to its proof) — marked #[ignore] with inline explanation rather than deleted, to preserve the audit trail. See SECURITY.md for full writeup. - f4b11ae: fix(landing): footer matches reference style - brand name + tagline, powered by line - f7e7179: fix(landing): remove bento mini-nav from CTA section, keep just heading + button

Commits: - 96440a8: fix: txHash in Stellar Expert link, claim page light theme fee estimate, Growthip privacy features in what-happens section - 8dca3a2: fix(activity): restore missing cae9c66: fix(activity): remove template literal from href - dd8ebba: fix(dashboard): remove Your Tips section, update activity with real notes + Stellar Expert link, light theme TokenSelector/AmountSelector, fix network badge

Commits: - bb0caa3: fix(landing): use hugeicons:absolute for Absolute Privacy feature icon - 2f2a396: fix(landing): scale up Soroban logo to visually match Stellar logo size - 1445994: fix(landing): remove Albedo, fix Stellar/SDF/Soroban logo to 204x64, 4-col grid - 506658e: fix(landing): grid-cols-5 to keep all 5 logos in single row, Soroban same size as Stellar - 3cf2898: fix(landing): enlarge Stellar/SDF logos to h-24, wallet icons to w-20 h-20 - 099485c: fix(landing): increase Stellar and SDF logo size, keep wallet icons fixed circle size

desc: One of my commit sha starts with "ab".
When I delete code, I delete a lot.
I made an epic commit with a message over 500 chars.
I pushed a commit with "cafe" once.

body: Commits: - e48bea8: fix: proper scroll layout, white bg all dashboard pages, settings light theme, welcome text weight - cdf9d1a: fix(topbar): light theme dropdown + avatar, fix dashboard scroll - 041f4f9: fix: force white background on dashboard, fix activity page icons - 98fbe05: fix(sidebar): match HTML prototype design exactly - white background, light gray borders - active nav item: bg-[#E5E5E5] text-[#0A0A0A] font-bold - hover: bg-[#F5F5F5] - collapsed: 88px with centered icons + speech bubble tooltips - premium card: dark bg with white text - topbar: white/light background - Plus Jakarta Sans font via CSS variable in body - e29db36: fix(dashboard): light theme + Plus Jakarta Sans font - load Plus Jakarta Sans via next/font/google (variable font) - body default background: #FAFAFA (light) - .main-gradient class for landing/main pages (dark gradient) - dashboard uses light-base/dark-base bg from HTML prototype - font-sans uses --font-plus-jakarta-sans variable

Commits: - f09c81f: fix(landing): stacked logo+text layout matching reference, no hover effects - 8c03353: fix(landing): inline logo+text layout, use Dark icon variants, remove broken SDF entry - 2446c3c: fix(wallet-modal): restore Get Freighter text in anchor - a79b57b: fix(wallet-modal): restore Get Freighter text in anchor - cbd425e: fix(wallet-modal): restore missing ffb8054: fix(wallet-modal): light theme - white background, light borders - d7facf6: fix(hydration): remove localStorage from useState initializer to prevent React error #418
